query:
-- เปรียบเทียบ contracts.bad_debt_amount กับ SUM จาก payment_transactions (receipt_no IS NOT NULL)
-- เพื่อหาสัญญาที่ต่างกัน
SELECT 
  c.external_id,
  c.contract_no,
  c.bad_debt_amount AS contracts_bad_debt,
  COALESCE(pt_sum.sum_with_receipt, 0) AS sum_with_receipt,
  COALESCE(pt_sum_all.sum_all, 0) AS sum_all_rows,
  ROUND(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(pt_sum.sum_with_receipt, 0), 2) AS diff_vs_receipt,
  ROUND(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(pt_sum_all.sum_all, 0), 2) AS diff_vs_all
FROM contracts c
-- SUM เฉพาะ rows ที่มี receipt_no (เหมือน debtDb.ts)
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    contract_external_id,
    SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_with_receipt
  FROM payment_transactions
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND receipt_no IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
  GROUP BY contract_external_id
) pt_sum ON pt_sum.contract_external_id = c.external_id
-- SUM ทุก rows (รวม receipt_no IS NULL)
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    contract_external_id,
    SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_all
  FROM payment_transactions
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
  GROUP BY contract_external_id
) pt_sum_all ON pt_sum_all.contract_external_id = c.external_id
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
  AND ABS(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(pt_sum.sum_with_receipt, 0)) > 1
ORDER BY ABS(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(pt_sum.sum_with_receipt, 0)) DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

-- SUM เฉพาะ rows ที่มี receipt_no (เหมือน debtDb.ts)

-- SUM ทุก rows (รวม receipt_no IS NULL)
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    contract_external_id,
    SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_all
  FROM payment_transactions
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
